$comment: Hook profile definitions. Active profile is set via ECC_HOOK_PROFILE env var (default: standard). Each profile lists the hook IDs that are active. Hook runtime logic lives in scripts/lib/hook-flags.js.

minimal.description: GateGuard only — maximum autonomy with fact-forcing on writes and destructive commands

standard.description: Balanced profile — GateGuard + observability + doc warnings + compact suggestions (default)

strict.description: All hooks active — maximum guardrails for production work
